title: Chris Germany
compiled_truth: Chris Germany is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-25), Chris Germany sent 5844 and received 2029 emails, totalling 7873 interactions. Top correspondents: [Scott Goodell](people/scott-goodell) (614), [Victor Lamadrid](people/victor-lamadrid) (472), [Robert Allwein](people/robert-allwein) (411), [Brenda Fletcher](people/brenda-fletcher) (410), [Judy Townsend](people/judy-townsend) (381). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, bankrupt, calendar, contacts, deleted_items, discussion_threads.
